# Skillpress

> Skillpress is a package manager for portable Agent Skills directories. It syncs canonical skill sources to Codex, Claude Code, Cursor project rules, Antigravity global customizations, and agent-local skill roots, then reports drift.

Skillpress is not a skill authoring system, a CLI promoter, a workflow orchestrator, or a proof/evidence system. Product repositories own their skills; Skillpress renders, installs, manifests, and verifies provider caches.

## Start Here

- [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/attebury/skillpress/main/README.md): Install, quickstart, source layouts, provider targets, manifest shape, and development commands.
- [Operating model](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/attebury/skillpress/main/docs/operating-model.md): Source and target model, verification rules, and public release constraints.
- [Boundary](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/attebury/skillpress/main/docs/decisions/skillpress-boundary.md): Ownership boundary, excluded responsibilities, and product invariants.

## Source

- [CLI entrypoint](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/attebury/skillpress/main/bin/skillpress.js): Command routing for boundary, status, doctor, sync, and publish.
- [Version info](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/attebury/skillpress/main/src/version-info.js): Repo-independent CLI version packet and human-readable version text.
- [Source discovery](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/attebury/skillpress/main/src/source.js): Agent Skills directory discovery, hashing, and source-tree safety checks.
- [Provider targets](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/attebury/skillpress/main/src/providers.js): Provider-specific install roots for Codex, agent-local roots, Claude Code, Cursor, and Antigravity.
- [Sync](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/attebury/skillpress/main/src/sync.js): Rendering canonical skills into provider targets and writing install manifests.
- [Status](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/attebury/skillpress/main/src/status.js): Installed-vs-expected reporting and drift detection.
- [Doctor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/attebury/skillpress/main/src/doctor.js): Aggregated status and policy findings.
- [Skill lint](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/attebury/skillpress/main/src/skill-lint.js): Generic Agent Skills linting and optional dogfood policy rules.
- [Contracts](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/attebury/skillpress/main/src/contracts.js): Command contract loading for validating command references.
- [Manifest](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/attebury/skillpress/main/src/manifest.js): Install manifest validation, v1 reads, and v2 writes.

## Release

- [Release process](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/attebury/skillpress/main/docs/release.md): Public verification, beta npm publish, and smoke install steps.
- [Security policy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/attebury/skillpress/main/SECURITY.md): Supported security surface and reporting path.
- [Package metadata](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/attebury/skillpress/main/package.json): Runtime package metadata, npm package allowlist, and test scripts.

## Optional

- [Skillpress consumer skill](https://github.com/attebury/skillpress/tree/main/agent-skills/src/skillpress): Source-only Skillpress guidance; not shipped in the npm package.
- [Runlane example](https://github.com/attebury/skillpress/tree/main/examples/runlane): Example tool-scoped source and optional dogfood policy configuration; not shipped in the npm package.
- [Remogram example](https://github.com/attebury/skillpress/tree/main/examples/remogram): Example command contracts and policy fixtures; not shipped in the npm package.
